arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدَانُ، قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي أَبِي، عَنْ شُعْبَةَ، عَنْ سَلَمَةَ، بِهَذَا قَالَ فَلَقِيتُهُ بَعْدُ بِمَكَّةَ، فَقَالَ لاَ أَدْرِي أَثَلاَثَةَ أَحْوَالٍ أَوْ حَوْلاً وَاحِدًا‏.‏

english.text:
the above narration (Hadith 616) from Ubai bin Ka`b: adding, "I met the sub-narrator at Mecca later 
on, but he did not remember whether Ka`b had announced what he had found one year or three years."

chapter.english: Lost Things Picked up by Someone (Luqatah)
